name: Black Bean Chili Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 Del Monte FreshCut Diced Tomatoes with Garlic & Onion
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan combine the black bean soup, diced tomatoes, sweet corn, green onions, and salsa.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Serve with a dollop of sour cream if desired.
